arts.sum: He played for both Manchester clubs: while only representing the reserves for United, he turned out for City’s first team. Private F/1723 Oscar H.S. Linkson | 17th (Service) Battalion (1st Football) Middlesex Regiment | Manchester United 1908-13

arts.ttl: I followed Ruben Amorim's tenure at Sporting CP - here's what he will do at Man United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will officially begin his Manchester United tenure on Monday, ending a four-and-a-half year stint at Sporting Clube de Portugal in Lisbon

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Manchester United vs Leicester live on TV in UK today?
arts.sum: Supporters unable to watch Ruud van Nistelrooy’s final game in interim charge

arts.ttl: What channel is Man Utd vs Leicester on? TV decision made for Sunday 2pm kick-off
arts.sum: Sky Sports haven't selected Manchester United vs Leicester City for coverage as part of their Super Sunday offerings, meaning fans in the UK won't be able to watch the match live

arts.ttl: I heard Ruud van Nistelrooy talk about pressure and potential at Man United - Ruben Amorim should listen
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy will take charge of his final game as caretaker manager of Man Utd today and he believes the club is the same one he enjoyed so much success at as a player.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Leicester in Ruud van Nistelrooy's final game in charge
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Leicester in the Premier League on Sunday and this is how our writers think they should start.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim January priority 'emerges' as Manchester United braced for £66m transfer battle
arts.sum: The latest Man United rumours amid updates on the January transfer window, Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka and Sporting CP defender Ousmane Diomande.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim didn't want me at Sporting - now I can show him and Manchester United what I'm made of
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will be casting a detailed eye over Manchester United's Premier League game with Leicester City on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Ruben Amorim set for awkward talks as new boss faces early headache
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim starts work as Manchester United's new permanent boss on Monday, with Ruud van Nistelrooy to lead the team for the fourth and final time in Sunday's clash with Leicester

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd face Leicester in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon at Old Trafford. Preview includes team news, how to watch and more.
